themes.title: Billing Engine Development
themes.description: Core functionalities for usage-based billing and compliance.

themes.title: Pricing Features Enhancement
themes.description: Improvements and additional features for pricing and customer management.

themes.title: User Experience and Compliance
themes.description: Focus on user feedback and compliance with accessibility standards.

milestones.name: MVP - Billing Engine and Compliance
milestones.description: Develop and implement the usage-based billing engine and ensure accessibility compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: Billing engine is operational with 100% accessibility compliance.

milestones.name: V1 - Pricing Features Implementation
milestones.description: Implement pricing calculator, spending alerts, grandfathering, and monitoring.
milestones.success_criteria: All pricing features are live with user feedback mechanisms in place.

milestones.name: V2 - User Feedback Mechanism
milestones.description: Implement a user feedback collection mechanism to enhance user experience.
milestones.success_criteria: User feedback mechanism is operational with at least 100 responses collected.

sequencing.reason: The pricing features depend on the successful implementation of the billing engine.
User feedback collection requires the pricing features to be fully implemented.

mvp.goal: Establish a functional billing engine with compliance.

v1.goal: Enhance pricing features and ensure customer satisfaction.

v2.goal: Gather user feedback to improve future iterations.
